Lumify
Table of Contents

Class Workspace

Namespace
lumify.api.Models.EF
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

A shared space that groups content (folders, notes, todo lists, events) and members. Content belongs to the workspace, not its creator. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

public class Workspace
Inheritance
object
Workspace

Properties

CreatedAt

Creation timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string CreatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

DeletedAt

Soft-delete timestamp (ISO-8601 string); null while active.

public string? DeletedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Events

Events belonging to this workspace.

public virtual ICollection<Event> Events { get; set; }

Property Value

ICollection<Event>

Folders

Folders belonging to this workspace.

public virtual ICollection<Folder> Folders { get; set; }

Property Value

ICollection<Folder>

ID

Primary key (GUID string).

public string ID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Name

Display name of the workspace.

public string Name { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Notes

Notes belonging to this workspace.

public virtual ICollection<Note> Notes { get; set; }

Property Value

ICollection<Note>

Owner

The owning user.

public virtual User Owner { get; set; }

Property Value

User

OwnerID

The user who created and owns the workspace.

public string OwnerID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

TodoLists

Todo lists belonging to this workspace.

public virtual ICollection<TodoList> TodoLists { get; set; }

Property Value

ICollection<TodoList>

UpdatedAt

Last-update timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string UpdatedAt { get; set; }

string

WorkspaceMembers

Memberships linking users to this workspace.
